title: ESC Re-Opening Monday June 22nd Under Alberta Phase 2 Guidelines
excerpt: Good news members – your squash club is ready to open for singles squash starting this Monday, June 22nd with some restrictions to comply with AHS Phase 2 guidelines. Of particular note, only singles squash will be available in the short term, and both players must be booked into our online booking system ahead of … Read more
content:
Good news members – your squash club is ready to open for singles squash starting this Monday, June 22nd with some restrictions to comply with AHS Phase 2 guidelines.

Of particular note, only singles squash will be available in the short term, and both players must be booked into our online booking system ahead of time. There will be no Change Room access except to retrieve equipment left there during the club closure. Hours are also restricted compared to normal and there is a sign-in procedure for every time you play.

Please read the letter from the board of directors which has a more detailed description of the current COVID-19 re-opening procedures.
